title: Agenda 2022-02-01: Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW) - Canada.ca
content:
## Agenda: Scientific Advisory Committee on Health Products for Women (SAC-HPW)
Date and Time: February 1, 2022, 12:30pm - 4:45 pm EST Location: via Zoom Chair: Lorraine Greaves (Chair), Louise Pilote (Vice-chair) Secretariat: Centre for Policy, Pediatrics and International Collaboration Participants: SAC-HPW members, Health Canada employees
12:30-12:35 Welcome and Opening Remarks Chief Medical Advisor, Health Canada and Senior Medical Advisor for the Health Products and Food Branch
12:35-12:45 Chair's Address, Review of Agenda, Introduction of Members, Review of Affiliations and Interests Chair
12:45-12:55 Session #1: Updates and Discussion on past SAC-HPW Recommendations to the Health Products and Food Branch Director General, Medical Devices Directorate; Director, Centre for Policy, Pediatrics and International Collaboration
12:55-1:15 Session #2: Breast Implant Patient Checklist Executive Director, Bureau of Investigation Testing Authorization, Special Access Program and Post-Market Surveillance
Medical Device Incident Reporting Templates Acting Associate Director, Bureau of Investigation Testing Authorization, Special Access Program and Post-Market Surveillance, MDD
1:15-2:00 Session #2: Committee Discussions and Feedback SAC-HPW members
2:15-2:35 Session #3:  The Health Canada SGBA Plus Action Plan: Collaborating to Build on our Success Director General, Health Programs and Strategic Initiatives; Director, Centre for Policy, Pediatrics and International Collaboration
2:35-2:50 Session #3: Committee Discussions and Feedback SAC-HPW members
2:50-3:20 Session #4:  Applying a SGBA Plus to the Lifecycle Management of Prescription Drugs Principle Investigator of research project 3:20-4:05 Session #4: Committee Discussions and Feedback SAC-HPW members
4:05-4:15 Secretariat updates SAC-HPW Secretariat
4:15-4:30 Summary of Recommendations and Adjournment of Meeting Chair
4:30-4:45 In-camera Session SAC-HPW members only
